Ported InLayerConstraintProcessor 1:1 from upstream Java: top insertion index handling, deferred bottom-node append, in-layer constraint parsing, and strategy factory wiring for IN_LAYER_CONSTRAINT_PROCESSOR.

Added direct transliteration of CommentPostprocessor: layer scan, top/bottom comment placement, edge reconnection via COMMENT_CONN_PORT, and layer reinsertion via set_layer.

2026-02-13: Replaced alg_layered_intermediate_compaction_vertical_segment.mbt marker with direct transliteration of intermediate.compaction.VerticalSegment: constructor geometry/junction-point capture, join_with union semantics (represented edges, bends, bounding boxes, constraints, potential parents, ignoreSpacing OR, aPort fallback, joined accumulation), intersects fuzzy overlap test, compare_to x-then-y ordering, and to_string parity.

Added graph/edge property support needed by this pair: LGraph Array[LNode] properties for hiddenNodes and LEdge LPort? properties for originalOppositePort. Added InternalProperties hiddenNodes and originalOppositePort.
Ported PartitionPostprocessor (1:1 behavior): removes ports marked with internal partition-dummy marker from layered nodes; preserved task name and processor wiring. Added InternalProperties.partitionDummy.

Added partitioning option keys org.eclipse.elk.partitioning.activate and org.eclipse.elk.partitioning.partition in layered_options_layered_options.mbt. PartitionPreprocessor now performs direct edge reversal for descending partition edges and BFS-based reversal decision for unpartitioned targets reachable to lower partitions, including priority.direction accumulation (+1000) and reversed-flag toggle. PartitionMidprocessor now groups nodes by partition, sorts partition ids, and inserts partition-dummy EAST->WEST edges between consecutive partitions with internal_properties_partition_dummy markers; preserves upstream early-return behavior on empty partition map.
2026-02-14: Replaced alg_layered_intermediate_hierarchical_port_dummy_size_processor.mbt marker with direct transliteration of HierarchicalPortDummySizeProcessor. Implemented per-layer NORTH/SOUTH external-port dummy collection via internal_properties_ext_port_side, width assignment with delta=2*spacing.edgeEdgeBetweenLayers (north top-down, south bottom-up), CENTER alignment assignment, EAST-port x repositioning, and task monitor parity. Wired IntermediateProcessorStrategy::HierarchicalPortDummySizeProcessor to concrete factory new_hierarchical_port_dummy_size_processor_layout_processor().
2026-02-14: Replaced alg_layered_intermediate_interactive_external_port_positioner.mbt marker with direct transliteration of InteractiveExternalPortPositioner. Implemented external-port graph-property gate, normal-node bounding box scan (min/max X/Y with margins), WEST/EAST dummy placement via FIRST_SEPARATE/LAST_SEPARATE constraints, NORTH/SOUTH placement via in-layer TOP/BOTTOM and single-port adjacent-node bound scan, and parity error path for unsupported non-normal dummy types. Wired IntermediateProcessorStrategy::InteractiveExternalPortPositioner to concrete factory new_interactive_external_port_positioner_layout_processor().
